magnetic-lock-installation.intro: Magnetic lock installation secures doors with fail-safe holding force when paired correctly with access control, power supplies and fire-release. Icomply design and install maglocks for commercial and multi-tenant doors across Greater Manchester and the North West, ensuring free escape, monitoring contacts and commissioning documentation that facilities teams can rely on.
magnetic-lock-installation.body: A maglock is only as safe as its egress design: break-glass or fire-panel release, request-to-exit, battery backup and door geometry all matter. Our engineers survey the door leaf, frame and traffic pattern before fitting brackets, armature plates and cable routes that last. Based in Stockport, we also replace failing magnets, upgrade ageing PSUs and integrate maglocks with Paxton, HID-compatible and other access platforms.

faq: Are magnetic locks allowed on fire exit doors?
They can be used when designed fail-safe with correct fire-panel or emergency release so occupants can escape — we design to fire-release best practice.
Do maglocks need battery backup?
A suitable power supply with battery standby is best practice so doors remain controlled during short mains failures while still releasing on fire signal where required.
Can you install maglocks on double doors?
Yes. We specify brackets and holding arrangements suitable for double-leaf and glass doors after inspection.
magnetic-lock-installation.seo_keywords: magnetic lock installation, maglock install, electromagnetic lock fitting, maglock access control, magnetic door lock Manchester, maglock fire release Stockport, commercial maglock North West, access control locks

electric-strike-installation.intro: Electric strike installation converts a standard latch door into access-controlled entry while often retaining a more traditional door feel than a maglock. Icomply fit electric strikes with readers, keypads or fobs across offices, blocks and commercial sites in the North West, coordinating strike type, lock case compatibility and free-escape behaviour before commissioning.
electric-strike-installation.body: Not every door accepts every strike — mortice cases, timber condition and frame metalwork decide the product. We survey first, then install strikes, power supplies and access interfaces with neat terminations and test sheets. From Stockport we cover Greater Manchester and surrounding counties for new access projects, strike replacements and hybrid sites that mix strikes on some doors with maglocks on others.

Repairs and replacements for worn or burned-out strikes
faq: What is the difference between an electric strike and a maglock?
A strike releases the latch keep so a mechanical lock can open electrically; a maglock holds the door by electromagnet. Choice depends on door hardware and fire strategy.
Is fail-secure or fail-safe better?
It depends on whether the door must unlock on power loss for escape or remain secure. We advise per door type and fire strategy during survey.
Can you install electric strikes on aluminium doors?
Often yes with the correct strike body and keep arrangement; aluminium and uPVC doors need careful measurement before ordering.

Can video door entry call a smartphone?
IP and some hybrid systems can; traditional hardwired video may be handset-only. We recommend the right approach after survey.
Do you replace just the outdoor panel?
If compatible yes; otherwise a matched panel and station upgrade may be required for reliable colour video.
colour-video-door-entry.seo_keywords: colour video door entry, color video door entry UK, video door entry install, video intercom Manchester, colour video entry Stockport, apartment video door entry North West, video door phone system, communal video entry

door-entry-handset-replacement.intro: Door entry handset replacement restores speech, door release and video where indoor stations have failed, gone noisy or become obsolete. Icomply supply and fit replacement door entry handsets and indoor monitors across Greater Manchester and the North West for flats, offices and managed blocks, checking compatibility before ordering so you are not left with the wrong station on the wall.
door-entry-handset-replacement.body: A handset is rarely a pure swap without identifying the system generation, wiring and panel type. We diagnose whether the fault is the station, power supply, riser cable or outdoor panel, then quote the correct replacement or a wider upgrade if spares are discontinued. From Stockport we offer single-flat reactive visits and multi-flat handset programmes for agents modernising occupied blocks.
door-entry-handset-replacement.meta_desc: Door entry handset replacement across Greater Manchester & the North West. Icomply diagnose, supply & fit compatible handsets with fixed quotes.
focus_points: Correct identification of system type before ordering
Single-flat and multi-flat handset replacement programmes
Fault diagnosis beyond the handset when needed
Upgrade options when original stations are obsolete
faq: My handset has no dial tone or call — is it always the handset?
Not always. Power, wiring and panel faults can look identical. We test before replacing parts unnecessarily.
Can you match the look of modern apartments?
Where the platform allows, slim video monitors can replace bulky handsets as part of an upgrade path.
How quickly can a handset be replaced?
Compatible stock can often be fitted on a short visit; special-order stations are scheduled once parts arrive.
door-entry-handset-replacement.seo_keywords: door entry handset replacement, intercom handset replacement, video door entry monitor replace, flat handset repair, door entry handset Manchester, intercom station Stockport, replace door entry phone North West, indoor station replacement

door-entry-panel-replacement.intro: Door entry panel replacement renews vandalised, weather-worn or obsolete entrance stations that residents and visitors use every day. Icomply replace door entry panels across the North West for blocks, offices and commercial premises, ensuring button directories, cameras, trade facilities and lock release continue to work with indoor handsets or modern IP stations.
door-entry-panel-replacement.body: Outdoor panels take the brunt of weather and misuse. We survey mounting, back boxes, cabling and system compatibility, then fit replacement panels with neat weather sealing and tested door release. Stockport engineers also advise when a full system upgrade is wiser than forcing a modern panel onto a failing legacy riser. Related works include maglock interfaces, access control readers beside the panel and improved lighting for video identification.
door-entry-panel-replacement.meta_desc: Door entry panel replacement across Greater Manchester & the North West. Icomply replace vandalised or obsolete panels with tested release & directories.
focus_points: Survey of panel type, back box and system compatibility
Weather-sealed panel install with directory programming
Lock release and trade button testing on completion
Advice on full upgrade when legacy systems block a simple swap
faq: Can you replace a panel without changing all handsets?
If a compatible panel exists for the current system, yes. Otherwise handsets may need upgrading together.
Do you fit vandal-resistant panels?
Yes. For exposed communal entrances we recommend robust panels and fixings suited to higher-risk locations.
Will the new panel keep the same flat numbering?
We programme directories to match your agreed numbering and naming standards during commissioning.
door-entry-panel-replacement.seo_keywords: door entry panel replacement, entrance panel replacement, video door panel, outdoor intercom panel, door entry panel Manchester, replace door entry station Stockport, vandal resistant door panel North West, communal entry panel upgrade

trade-button-door-entry.intro: Trade button door entry gives contractors and deliveries timed access through communal doors without handing out permanent keys or fobs. Icomply install, program and repair trade button door entry facilities on residential blocks and multi-tenant buildings across Greater Manchester and the North West, balancing convenience for managing agents with security for residents.
trade-button-door-entry.body: A poorly set trade button becomes a security hole; a well-managed one reduces damaged doors and frustrated trades. We configure time windows, integrate with panels and locks, and explain admin options for changing trade hours. From Stockport we retrofit trade facilities onto suitable systems, fix buttons that stick open, and combine trade access with fob systems so residents still use credentials outside trade periods.
trade-button-door-entry.meta_desc: Trade button door entry across Greater Manchester & the North West. Icomply install & program timed trade access on communal door entry systems.
focus_points: Trade facility design with sensible time windows
Panel and lock integration for controlled contractor entry
Repairs for stuck or abused trade buttons
Combined trade button and resident fob strategies
faq: Is a trade button a security risk?
It can be if left enabled all day. We set limited windows and advise agents on reviewing times as contractor patterns change.
Can trade access be disabled on bank holidays?
Depending on the system, schedules can exclude days or be adjusted by an administrator — we programme what the platform allows.
Do all door entry systems support trade buttons?
Many residential panels do; some IP and GSM systems use alternative temporary access methods. Survey confirms options.
trade-button-door-entry.seo_keywords: trade button door entry, trade button intercom, timed trade access, contractor door entry, trade button Manchester, communal trade access Stockport, tradesman entry button North West, residential trade facility
